text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: You look like you had a great vacation!
You look like you had a great vacation!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's you. Yeah, I suppose so.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I stopped by a park yesterday, and it was totally
empty. Man, I had such a great nap there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Even makes seeing your twerpy face this early in
the morning bearable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seems like Narita Taishin is in the best of spirits!
